note: Single source of truth for the instant quote calculator (consumed by /js/quote-calculator.js on the rates page). Prices mirror the Flat-Rate Menu on rates.html and must be kept in sync with it. zoneMinimum values come from /data/service-areas.json (Zone A = $100 first hour, Zone B = $145 first hour). Each task price already includes the service call / first hour for a single-task visit; the calculator explains that bundling several tasks into one visit typically costs less than the raw sum because the trip is shared.

tasks.name: Ceiling Fan & Light Fixtures
tasks.desc: Replacement on existing approved junction boxes and brackets.

tasks.name: Smart Doorbell & Thermostats
tasks.desc: Mounting and connecting to your existing low-voltage system wiring.

tasks.name: Smoke & CO Detectors
tasks.desc: Installing or replacing combined safety alarm units.

tasks.name: Garbage Disposal Replacement
tasks.desc: Swapping out existing disposal with a customer-supplied unit.

tasks.name: Toilet Component Rebuilds
tasks.desc: Replacement of flush valve, fill valve, flapper, and tank lever.

tasks.name: Kitchen & Bath Faucets
tasks.desc: Complete kitchen or bathroom sink faucet and supply line replacement.

tasks.name: Door Locks & Deadbolts
tasks.desc: Standard lockset or deadbolt swap on existing correctly aligned door prep.

tasks.name: Storm Door Installations
tasks.desc: Full install of standard pre-hung storm/screen doors in ready framing.

tasks.name: Window Blinds & Curtain Rods
tasks.desc: Hanging standard pre-sized blinds or decorative window hardware.

tasks.name: TV Wall Mounting
tasks.desc: Up to 65" TV on standard wood or metal studs (bracket not included).

tasks.name: Cabinet Hardware Upgrades
tasks.desc: Swapping out knobs or pulls with exact-size replacements.

tasks.name: Dryer Vent Cleaning
tasks.desc: Exhaust line cleaning from dryer back to wall terminal to maximize airflow.

tasks.name: Gutter Cleaning
tasks.desc: Debris removal, downspout clearing, and flow testing (up to 145 linear feet, single-story).

tasks.name: Power Washing
tasks.desc: Driveways, walkways, patios, or decks (up to 1,000 sq ft).
